hero_target_label: Available to join a team on roles close to
proj_mn_desc: Led the overhaul and full automation of a business API for the Mobilier national web portal. Before the redesign, each object record had to be entered twice: in the MuseumPlus ERP, then manually in the web app. The new system connects directly to MuseumPlus via Laravel / RabbitMQ and synchronises all CRUD actions on collections in real time.
proj_cc_desc: Punctual AMOA support for the corrective maintenance (MCO) of the #CultureChezNous mobile app (French Ministry of Culture) on Android and iOS. Bug qualification, coordination with the mobile development contractor and functional acceptance testing of delivered fixes.
proj_sem_kpil: developers coordinated · Algolia deployed · 0 regressions after test rollout

Coordination of a 6-person onshore/offshore team, data migration management and end-to-end functional acceptance testing.

proj_vr_desc: Automated regulatory monitoring platform watching 5 official sources (CNIL, CERT-FR, ANSSI, EUR-Lex, CERT Santé) across 6 frameworks (GDPR, NIS2, DORA, ISO 27001, HDS, PCI-DSS). Pipeline: Make → Gemini 2.0 Flash → pure HTML/JS dashboard.

exp_card3_li1: Translating needs into actionable user stories
profile_p1: My academic background in a DUT in Internet and Multimedia Professions, a degree in digital communication and webmastering, then a master’s degree in multimedia product and service design, gave me a multidisciplinary foundation to understand usages, formalise needs, work with delivery teams and translate a business intent into a concrete solution. This multidisciplinary path also allowed me to work with different tools for design, content management, web production and project tracking.
proj_r_kpil: ministerial platforms covered by the reference guide
proj_sem_desc: Operational management of the Sémaphore intranet platform at the French Ministry of Culture for nearly a year. Weekly follow-up committee facilitation, daily coordination of the development team, test plan creation, functional testing and user story writing with acceptance criteria. Continuous management and prioritisation of the incident and evolution backlog.
proj_ird_desc: Simultaneous management of a batch of complex functional evolutions across three distinct scopes at the Institut de recherche pour le développement: institutional site, webzine and intranet. Backlog management, user story prioritisation and interface role between business teams and the delivery team.

profile_p2: Today, I define myself as a technical-functional profile focused on web and digital projects. I enjoy turning sometimes unclear needs into actionable elements: process maps, specifications, test plans, tracking materials or user documentation. My role is to create links between stakeholders, structure exchanges and contribute to useful, clear and well-tracked deliveries.
